name: Singapore
avoid: Singapore F1 Grand Prix week (Sep) — prices spike
stopoverNote: Changi Airport — consistently world #1. Singapore Airlines Suites Class available. 96-hour free stopover visa. Perfect hub for India ↔ Australia/NZ/Japan routes.

cities.name: Marina Bay
cities.notes: Marina Bay Sands, Gardens by the Bay supertrees and light show

cities.name: Chinatown
cities.notes: Sri Mariamman Temple, hawker stalls and Buddha Tooth Relic Temple

cities.name: Sentosa
cities.notes: Universal Studios, Siloso Beach, cable car and S.E.A. Aquarium

cities.name: Little India
cities.notes: Mustafa Centre, Sri Veeramakaliamman Temple and 24-hour street food
